name: flexobo-qa
description: Run and analyze Flexobo Python Playwright QA automation from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Run Flexobo Playwright tests and summarize failures.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for the Flexobo QA automation project. It guides Codex to run the existing Python pytest + Playwright suite through the local QA runner, collect Allure results, preserve Playwright traces, and report failures with practical debugging notes.
defaultPrompt: Run the Flexobo QA smoke tests and summarize failures.
Run the Flexobo login tests headed and tell me what breaks.
Analyze the latest Flexobo QA report and suggest fixes.
